name: Brand Consistency
description: Evaluate visual consistency with brand guidelines including logo usage, typography, and color palette adherence.
author: vulca

name: Audience Fit
description: Score content for target demographic appeal across 12 audience segments with cultural sensitivity.
author: vulca

name: Trend Alignment
description: Match against current aesthetic trends with weekly sync from design trend databases.
author: vulca

name: Accessibility Check
description: Verify content meets WCAG 2.1 AA standards for color contrast, text size, and interactive elements.
author: community

name: Emotional Resonance
description: Analyze the emotional impact of visual content across 8 dimensions including warmth, trust, and excitement.
author: vulca

name: Performance Benchmark
description: Measure inference latency and resource consumption for model evaluation pipelines.
author: community

name: auth_test
description: Testing auth flow for community agents
author: pytest
